text:
is the mother of Eren Jaeger and wife of Grisha Jaeger.

Appearance

Carla wears a yellow dress with a white apron, has long black hair tied into a loose ponytail predominantly on her right side, and brown eyes.

Personality

Carla appears to be a humble and soft spoken mother, wishing her son the best as she tends to the chores around the house.

Story

When Carla's son Eren goes to attend his first day at his new school, she sees him off and wishes him well. On a summer festival, Carla reminds Eren to use his allowance carefully.
